generateExpressions() - Method in class BusinessLayer.TruthTableGenerator
Generates Boolean expressions for each output LED.

Generates the truth table for the circuit.

Returns the current circuit.

Gets the list of circuits in the project.

Returns the list of components in the circuit.

Returns a list of all connectors connected to this pin.

Establishes and returns a connection to the SQL Server database.

Return a list of connectors in the circuit

Returns a list of input labels (A, B, C, ...).

Returns the list of input pins.

Gets the last circuit added to the project.
getName() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Project
Gets the project name.

Returns the list of output pins.
